chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْمُحْرِمِ يُضْطَرُّ إِلَى الصَّيْدِ وَ الْمَيْتَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 107 – The one in Ihraam is desperate to the hunted prey and the dead

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/367)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/367)
text: رَجُلٍ اضْطُرَّ إِلَى مَيْتَةٍ وَ صَيْدٍ وَ هُوَ مُحْرِمٌ قَالَ يَأْكُلُ الصَّيْدَ وَ يَفْدِي .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Mahboub, from Shahaab, from Ibn Bukeyr and Zurara,
from Abu Abdullahasws regarding a man desperate to an animal carcass and a hunted prey, and he is in Ihraam. Heasws said: ‘He should eat the hunted prey, and he should (pay its) ransom’.
en.sarwar: 3. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Hassan ibn Mahbub from Shihab from ibn Bukayr from Zurarah who has said the following: “About the case of a man in the state of Ihram who is forced to eat from hunting or carcasses, abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that he can eat from hunting and pay the ransom?”
